member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory
member.summary: Base grid inventory with tetris-style packing and stacking. Inherit to implement special rules.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.Width
member.summary: The width of the inventory in grid cells.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.Height
member.summary: The height of the inventory in grid cells.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.SlotMode
member.summary: Determines how items occupy space in this inventory.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.InventoryId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the inventory.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.IsNetworked
member.summary: Returns true if the inventory is currently being synced across the network.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.Network
member.summary: Access to the networked inventory. You can make networked changes to the inventory using this object.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.Caller
member.summary: When inside a method with the this will be the that called the method remotely.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.HasAuthority
member.summary: Check if we can modify this inventory directly.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.AddSubscriber(System.Guid)
member.summary: Adds a new subscriber to the inventory using the provided connection identifier. If the inventory is networked, has authority, and the connection is not the local one, it sends the full state of the inventory to the specified subscriber.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.RemoveSubscriber(System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a subscriber from the inventory.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.OnItemAdded
member.summary: Called when an item is added to the inventory.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.OnItemRemoved
member.summary: Called when an item is removed from the inventory.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.OnInventoryChanged
member.summary: Called when the inventory is changed in some way.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.OnItemMoved
member.summary: Called when an item is moved within the inventory.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.GetEffectiveWidth(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem)
member.summary: Gets the effective width of an item in this inventory based on the slot mode.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.GetEffectiveHeight(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem)
member.summary: Gets the effective height of an item in this inventory based on the slot mode.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryGetSlot(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.InventorySlot@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve the inventory slot associated with the specified inventory item.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.GetItemAt(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the inventory item located at the specified grid coordinates within the inventory. If no item is found at the given coordinates, the method returns null.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.GetItemsInRect(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all inventory items within the specified rectangular area.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryConsolidateStacks
member.summary: Merges stackable items to consolidate space.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.CanPlaceItemAt(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,System.Int32,System.Int32,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem[])
member.summary: Checks if an item can be placed at the specified position, optionally excluding certain items from collision checks.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.CanMoveOrSwap(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if an item can be moved or swapped to the target position.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.CanSwapItems(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem)
member.summary: Checks if two items can be swapped (each fits in the other's position).

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryAddAt(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds an item at a specific position. Does not merge into existing stacks.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryMove(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Moves an item to a new position within the same inventory.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TrySwap(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem)
member.summary: Swaps the positions of two items in the same inventory.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryTransferTo(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory)
member.summary: Transfers an item to another inventory, placing it at the first available position.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryTransferToAt(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Transfers an item to another inventory at a specific position.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TrySwapBetween(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory)
member.summary: Swaps an item from this inventory with an item in another inventory. Each item ends up at the other's original position.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryTransferOrSwapAt(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory,System.Int32,System.Int32,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem@)
member.summary: Transfers an item to another inventory, swapping with any single item at the target position. If the target is empty, just transfers. If there's exactly one item, swaps.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryMoveOrSwap(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,System.Int32,System.Int32,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem@)
member.summary: Moves an item within the same inventory, or swaps if there's exactly one item at the target.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.TryCombineStacksTo(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem,Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory,System.Int32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Combines stacks across inventories. Source is in this inventory, dest is in another.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear all items from the inventory.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.ExecuteWithoutAuthority(System.Func{Conna.Inventory.InventoryResult})
member.summary: Execute an action with authority checks bypassed.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory.ExecuteWithoutAuthority(System.Action)
member.summary: Execute an action with authority checks bypassed.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.BaseItemAsset
member.summary: A base item asset class that inherits . Inherit this for any further customization needed for game resource items.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.ExampleInventory
member.summary: An example inventory class.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.ExampleInventory.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,Conna.Inventory.InventorySlotMode)
member.summary: An example inventory class.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.GameResourceItem`1
member.summary: Base class for inventory items that are based from a .

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.GameResourceItem`1.Resource
member.summary: The that this item is based from.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.GameResourceItem`1.LoadFromResource(`0)
member.summary: Load data from the specified .

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.GameResourceItem`1.OnResourceUpdated(`0)
member.summary: Called when the used for this item has been updated.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.HostAttribute
member.summary: Methods on an or a with this attribute will be invoked on the host.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem
member.summary: Base class for inventory items. Inherit this for your actual game items.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this item.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.Inventory
member.summary: The inventory that this item belongs to.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.Caller
member.summary: When inside a method with the this will be the that called the method remotely.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.Width
member.summary: Size in cells. Override for non-1x1 items.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.MaxStackSize
member.summary: Maximum number of items allowed in a stack.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.StackCount
member.summary: Current number of items in the stack.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.DirtyProperties
member.summary: A set of dirty networked properties that should be sent to all subscribers of the that this belongs to.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.Serialize(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Override to serialize the item for networking.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.Deserialize(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Override to deserialize an item for networking.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.CanStackWith(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem)
member.summary: Determines whether these two items can stack together. Override to include metadata checks.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventoryItem.CreateStackClone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new item instance that represents the same "kind" of item, but with a new stack count. Override to copy metadata fields.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.InventorySlot
member.summary: Where an item lives inside an inventory.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySlot.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Where an item lives inside an inventory.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.InventorySlotMode
member.summary: Determines how items occupy space in an inventory.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.InventorySlotMode.Tetris
member.summary: Items occupy space based on their Width and Height properties (Tetris-style).

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.InventorySlotMode.Single
member.summary: All items occupy exactly one slot regardless of their actual size.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem
member.summary: A that contains all registered inventories.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.GetOrCreate``1(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,Conna.Inventory.InventorySlotMode)
member.summary: Get an inventory by its unique ID, or create a new one and register it for networking if one cannot be found. Inventories created this way will be networked by default.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.GetOrCreate(Sandbox.TypeDescription,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,Conna.Inventory.InventorySlotMode)
member.summary: Get an inventory by its unique ID, or create a new one and register it for networking if one cannot be found. Inventories created this way will be networked by default.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.Remove(Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory)
member.summary: Remove an inventory from the system and dispose of it.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.MarkDirty(Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory)
member.summary: Mark an inventory as being dirty. Dirty inventories are iterated each tick to broadcast networked item properties to all subscribers.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.Register(Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory)
member.summary: Register an inventory with this system.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.Unregister(Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory)
member.summary: Unregister an inventory from this system.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.InventorySystem.TryFind(System.Guid,Conna.Inventory.BaseInventory@)
member.summary: Find an inventory by its unique ID.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.NetworkMode
member.summary: Defines how an inventory broadcasts network updates to clients.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.NetworkMode.Subscribers
member.summary: Only clients that have been explicitly subscribed via will receive inventory updates. Best for player-specific inventories where not everyone needs to see the contents.

member.name: F:Conna.Inventory.NetworkMode.Global
member.summary: All connected clients automatically receive inventory updates. Best for shared world inventories that everyone can see.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.NetworkedAttribute
member.summary:
Properties belonging to an that have this attribute will be automatically synchronized with subscribers of its parent whenever the value changes.
The property setter must be public.

member.name: T:Conna.Inventory.NetworkedInventory
member.summary: Network accessor for inventory operations. Automatically routes through the host.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.NetworkedInventory.Enabled
member.summary: Whether networking is enabled on this inventory. If networking is enabled, synchronization of the inventory is routed through the host. The host has authority over the inventory.

member.name: P:Conna.Inventory.NetworkedInventory.Mode
member.summary: Determines how this inventory broadcasts updates to clients. only sends to explicitly subscribed clients. broadcasts to all connected clients.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.NetworkedInventory.BroadcastItemDataChangedList(Conna.Inventory.InventoryItemDataChangedList)
member.summary: Broadcasts item data changes to all recipients based on the current .

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.NetworkedInventory.BroadcastToRecipients``1(``0)
member.summary: Broadcasts a message to all recipients based on the current . For , only sends to subscribed clients. For , sends to all connected clients.

member.name: M:Conna.Inventory.SerializedEntry.CreateItem
member.summary: Create an from this serialized entry.
